section1.label: Swiss Craftsmanship
section1.title: CRAFTING DISTINCTION
section1.text: The Desert Rose Gin Co. blends Swiss precision with unique botanicals. A venture born from the vision of two brothers with the commitment of distilling high-quality gin inspired by distant worlds.

section2.label: Opulent Escape
section2.title: SAHARAN INSPIRED
section2.text: An opulent Organic Gin, carefully crafted and distilled in Switzerland through a small-batch production process using Desert Dates and other specific botanicals.

section3.label: The Passion
section3.title: THE FOUNDERS
section3.text: A gin born through passion from exceptional spirits. An extraordinary creation, a gin that tells a story with every sip.

section1.label: Balance & Asymmetry
section1.title: HARMONY & EDGE
section1.text: Like the enchanting creation of the rose stone in the Saharan desert evaporation of mineral-rich water, our Gin is crafted in a meticulous distillation process with botanicals that brings you beyond the ordinary.

section2.label: Palate Prestige
section2.title: INTRIGUE THE PALATE
section2.text: Set out on a journey of taste that invites you to indulge in a world of unparalleled flavors and inspirations. This master botanical blend pairs perfectly and enriches the precious flavor of gourmet dishes.

section3.label: Versatility
section3.title: REDEFINE VERSATILITY
section3.text: From rocks to mixology, you can explore various dimensions. Our gin adapts to every desire.

classic.name: DESERT ROSE GIN CLASSIC EDITION
classic.description: Small batch London Dry Gin, handcrafted, bottled and distilled in Switzerland. Saharan desert inspired with notes of desert dates and saffron. A light and smooth sip with distinct finish of spices.

entries.quote: Elegant and precise. The saffron note stays refined, and the finish is clean enough to drink neat.
entries.author: Marco R.
entries.label: Zurich

entries.quote: It works beautifully in a dry martini. Distinctive without becoming heavy or over-spiced.
entries.author: Elena V.
entries.label: Lugano

entries.quote: The bottle presentation feels premium, but the real surprise is how smooth the palate is.
entries.author: Jonas F.
entries.label: Basel

limited.name: DESERT ROSE GIN LIMITED EDITION
limited.description: A unique London Dry Gin, bottled and handcrafted in Switzerland. A Saharan desert inspired with an Asian fusion. A master distillation of Saharan Dates, Darjeeling tea and citrus fruits for a unique, intense and crisp finish on the palate.

entries.quote: The Darjeeling and citrus combination makes this feel more layered and perfumed than most limited gins.
entries.author: Chiara P.
entries.label: Milan

entries.quote: Very expressive on the nose, then surprisingly soft in the glass. It feels special from the first pour.
entries.author: Daniel S.
entries.label: Geneva

entries.quote: One of the few limited releases that still feels balanced in a tonic. Floral, bright, and memorable.
entries.author: Nadine T.
entries.label: Lausanne

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.section1_p1: These terms and conditions apply to all legal transactions entered into between The Desert Rose Gin Co. Sagl and outside contracting parties to whom it provides services or to whom it acts as a vendor.
terms.section1_p2: Any changes, necessary agreements and additions to the legal negotiations put in place require to be expressed always in writing.
terms.section1_p3: If individual provisions are found to be invalid, the validity of other provisions remains unaffected.
terms.section1_p4: A contract is concluded upon confirmation of the contract (order confirmation) by The Desert Rose Gin Co. Sagl, or upon acceptance of the offer of The Desert Rose Gin Co. Sagl by the other contracting party.
terms.section2_p1: 2.1 All information acquired by reason of the order, particularly trade and industrial secrets as well as information spontaneously communicated otherwise, will be treated in strict confidence and may be passed on to third parties only with the express written consent of the contractor.
terms.section2_p2: 2.2 Employees and counterparts of The Desert Rose Gin Co. Sagl are subject to business and official secrecy; they are also bound by professional secrecy.
terms.section2_p3: 2.3 This is without prejudice to legal obligations regarding the disclosure of information that METAS in principle treats as confidential.
terms.section3_p1: 3.1 Costs (fees) and charges for services provided by The Desert Rose Gin Co. Sagl shall be based on the catalog of goods and services applicable in the particular case or the bid submitted.
terms.section3_p2: 3.2 Invoices must be paid within the period specified in the invoice document, however, within 30 days after the invoice is issued. The currency used is the Swiss franc.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page describes how the site is managed with regard to the processing of personal data of users who consult it, in accordance with the regulations on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data.
privacy.controller_text: As part of the consultation of this site, data relating to identified or identifiable persons may be processed. The Owner of their processing The Desert Rose Gin Co. Sagl (hereinafter The Company).
privacy.place_text: The processing of data collected through the website www.thedesertrosegin.com takes place at the headquarters of the company Data Controller, or at the headquarters of third parties companies.
privacy.navigation_text: The computer systems and software procedures used to operate this website acquire, during their normal operation, some personal data whose transmission is implicit in the use of Internet communication protocols.
privacy.cookies_text: The site uses so-called session cookies. The use of so-called session cookies is strictly limited to the transmission of session identifiers necessary to enable the safe and efficient exploration of the site.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.intro: For The Desert Rose Gin, accessibility is important. We have done our best to make this site as accessible as possible and continue to improve our accessibility every day.
accessibility.compliance_text: We strive to implement the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) consistently throughout www.thedesertrosegin.com Regular content review and quality checks are important to us.
accessibility.usage_text: If you cannot use a pointing device such as a mouse, you can control functionality using the keyboard:

ageGate.subtitle: Age Verification
ageGate.message: This experience is intended for visitors of legal drinking age in their country of residence.
ageGate.underage: You must be 18 or older to enter

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.message: We use essential cookies to improve performance, remember your preferences, and keep the experience smooth.
cookie.necessaryDescription: Required for security, navigation, and core site functionality.
cookie.analyticsDescription: Helps measure traffic and understand how visitors use the site.
cookie.marketingDescription: Allows advertising and remarketing tools such as Meta Pixel.
